title: (Bullish Signal) SNAP, enters a weekly bullish trend. Expect an Uptrend continuation.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Snap Inc - Ordinary Shares - Class A (SNAP, $45.26) is predicted by Tickeron's A.I.dvisor to grow by 2% to $46.17 or more within the next week. With its winning streak extending for a consecutive week, SNAP is expected to continue climbing following the week-long Uptrend ― the odds of an Uptrend continuation are 88%. Current price $44.69 is above $41.55 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 10/22/20 - 11/23/20, the price experienced a +16% Uptrend. During the week of 11/16/20 - 11/23/20, the stock enjoyed a +16% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/zll3ttaan7161.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=95c224d1301b50bc7c4fc6fb3b4a071c501d7ec5

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 23, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on SNAP as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 41 of 53 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

SNAP moved above its 50-day Moving Average on September 09, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

Following a +7.02% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where SNAP advanced for three days, in 177 of 223 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 153 of 184 cases where SNAP Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 83%.
